seo_description: Current time in Sofia, Bulgaria. Live EET/EEST clock — UTC+2 standard, UTC+3 summer. Sofia time vs London, Athens, Istanbul, Moscow, New York.

faq.question: What time is it in Sofia right now?
faq.answer: Sofia operates on Eastern European Time (EET/UTC+2) during winter and Eastern European Summer Time (EEST/UTC+3) during summer. Bulgaria follows EU Daylight Saving Time rules, advancing clocks one hour in late March and setting them back in late October. Use the live clock above to see the exact current time in Sofia.

faq.question: What time zone is Sofia in?
faq.answer: Sofia is in the Eastern European Time zone (EET), which is UTC+2 during standard time (late October to late March) and EEST/UTC+3 during summer (late March to late October). This is the same timezone as Athens (Greece), Nicosia (Cyprus), Tallinn (Estonia), Helsinki (Finland), Kyiv (Ukraine), and Bucharest (Romania). Sofia is 1 hour ahead of Berlin and Paris year-round.

faq.question: Does Sofia observe Daylight Saving Time?
faq.answer: Yes. Sofia and all of Bulgaria follow EU Daylight Saving Time rules. Clocks advance 1 hour forward on the last Sunday in March at 3:00 AM EET (becoming 4:00 AM EEST/UTC+3), and fall back 1 hour on the last Sunday in October at 4:00 AM EEST (becoming 3:00 AM EET/UTC+2). This is synchronised with all EU member states.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Sofia and London?
faq.answer: Sofia is 2 hours ahead of London during winter (EET/UTC+2 vs GMT/UTC+0) and 2 hours ahead during summer (EEST/UTC+3 vs BST/UTC+1), since both the UK and Bulgaria observe DST on the same schedule. The gap remains a constant 2 hours year-round. When it is 10:00 AM in London, it is 12:00 PM (noon) in Sofia.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Sofia and Moscow?
faq.answer: Sofia and Moscow are on the same time during winter (EET/UTC+2 = MSK/UTC+3 — wait, Moscow is UTC+3 and Sofia in winter is UTC+2, so Moscow is 1 hour ahead in winter). In summer, Sofia advances to EEST (UTC+3), matching Moscow's MSK (UTC+3). So: in winter Sofia is 1 hour behind Moscow; in summer Sofia and Moscow are the same time.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Sofia and New York?
faq.answer: Sofia is 7 hours ahead of New York during winter (EET/UTC+2 vs EST/UTC-5) and 7 hours ahead during summer (EEST/UTC+3 vs EDT/UTC-4), since both regions observe DST. The gap remains approximately 7 hours year-round. When it is 9:00 AM in New York, it is 4:00 PM in Sofia.

faq.question: What is the best time to call Sofia from the US?
faq.answer: From New York (EST/UTC-5), Sofia is 7 hours ahead. To reach Sofia during business hours (9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EET), East Coast callers should dial between 2:00 AM – 10:00 AM Eastern. The most practical window is early morning Eastern: a 7:00 AM New York call reaches Sofia at 2:00 PM — a good mid-afternoon slot. From Los Angeles (PST/UTC-8), the gap is 10 hours: a 6:00 AM Pacific call reaches Sofia at 4:00 PM.

faq.question: What are business hours in Sofia?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Sofia run 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EET/EEST, Monday through Friday. Government offices and banks operate 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM. Sofia's large IT and business process outsourcing (BPO) sector often follows flexible hours with some teams on Western European schedules. Retail shopping centres like Mall of Sofia and Paradise Center operate 10:00 AM – 10:00 PM. Bulgaria joined the EU in 2007, and its business environment aligns with European professional norms.

content_blocks.title: Sofia Time Zone — EET/EEST, 2 Hours Ahead of London
content_blocks.content: Sofia, the capital of Bulgaria, operates on Eastern European Time (EET/UTC+2) in winter and Eastern European Summer Time (EEST/UTC+3) in summer. Bulgaria observes EU Daylight Saving Time — clocks advance on the last Sunday in March and fall back on the last Sunday in October — in sync with Athens, Helsinki, Bucharest, Kyiv, and Tallinn. Sofia sits 1 hour ahead of Berlin and Paris year-round, and 2 hours ahead of London year-round (since both Bulgaria and the UK observe DST together). An interesting seasonal relationship exists with Moscow: in winter, Moscow (MSK/UTC+3) is 1 hour ahead of Sofia (EET/UTC+2); in summer, when Sofia advances to EEST (UTC+3), Sofia and Moscow are temporarily on the same time — though Russia does not observe DST. Sofia is 7 hours ahead of New York year-round.

content_blocks.title: Sofia — Emerging Tech Hub and Historical Capital
content_blocks.content: Sofia is one of Europe's fastest-growing technology and outsourcing destinations. Bulgaria's IT sector employs over 50,000 professionals, with Sofia hosting regional offices for major tech companies, fintech startups, and BPO operations attracted by competitive costs within the EU single market. The Bulgarian lev (BGN) is pegged to the euro at a fixed rate, and the country aims to join the eurozone. Sofia's old town, anchored by the Alexander Nevsky Cathedral and the Roman Serdica ruins, draws millions of tourists annually. The city also hosts a growing startup ecosystem, with coworking spaces and accelerators concentrated in the Lozenets and Vitosha Boulevard areas. Bulgaria joined the EU in 2007 and NATO in 2004. Sofia's low cost of living compared to Western European capitals has made it an attractive base for digital nomads and remote workers from across Europe.

content_blocks.title: Calling and Working with Sofia Internationally
content_blocks.content: Sofia's EET/EEST (UTC+2 in winter, UTC+3 in summer) timezone creates a predictable 2-hour lead over London year-round, making European coordination natural. A 9:00 AM London start corresponds to 11:00 AM in Sofia — excellent for morning collaboration. From Berlin or Paris (CET/UTC+1), Sofia is 1 hour ahead in winter and 1 hour ahead in summer, allowing near-perfect business-hour overlap. From New York (EST, UTC-5), the 7-hour gap means a 7:00 AM Eastern call reaches Sofia at 2:00 PM — the cleanest overlap point. From Dubai (UTC+4), Sofia is 2 hours behind in winter (EET vs GST) and 1 hour behind in summer (EEST vs GST), making Dubai morning calls well-aligned with Sofia. From Tokyo (UTC+9), Sofia is 7 hours behind in summer and 7 hours behind in winter. Bulgaria's country code is +359, and Sofia's city code is 2.

time_difference_table.difference: 2 hours behind Dubai (1 hour behind in summer)
10 hours ahead (9 hours when LA is on PDT)
6 hours behind Tokyo (7 hours in winter)
